title: Remove dead exports in ca-pi tools/src (zero external consumers)
evidence: Whole-tree search across plugins/ca-pi/tools/src and tools/test finds zero external references to three exports: `export function resolvePythonExecutable()` (bridge.ts:406 — a one-line wrapper over resolvePythonCommand, which IS consumed); `export const compactionLimits` (compaction.ts:453 — frozen constants object nothing reads); and the `export` on `CHILD_ATTESTATION_DOMAIN` (attestation.ts:4 — used only inside its own module at line 21). New-this-branch code with no callers, tests included.
impact: Dead public surface on the security-sensitive Pi adapter inflates the reviewed API and invites accidental future coupling to unmaintained entry points.
recommendation: Delete resolvePythonExecutable and compactionLimits; drop the export keyword on CHILD_ATTESTATION_DOMAIN (or wire compactionLimits into the tests that assert MAX_* bounds if that was the intent). Rebuild bundles per the stale-output release rule.
acceptance_criteria: typecheck+build clean with the three exports removed/demoted
no remaining src/test reference to the removed symbols
